caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a black microphone. His t-shirt features white text that reads "I CAN NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in a room that appears to be a studio or retail space, with a white male mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background, along with clothing racks and several framed pictures on the wall. Two logos are visible on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red and white logo on the right that reads "REALLY FLY DOT". Throughout the sequence, the man shifts his facial expression and head position, moving from a neutral look to a slightly skeptical or questioning expression, tilting his head back and to the side while continuing to face the microphone.
